title: murdannia graminea
intro: Murdannia graminea, also known as the Chinese purple passion or grassy murdannia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Commelinaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Murdannia graminea include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and supplements.
